name: bases-power-pack
description: Advanced database views and automation on top of Bases — kanban, calendar, Gantt, roll-ups, formulas, and saved filters.

scripts.test: npm run lint && node scripts/sync-shared.mjs --check && node tests/engine.test.mjs && node tests/verify-license.test.mjs && node tests/license.test.mjs && node tests/manifest-contract.test.mjs
scripts.test:ci: node tests/engine.test.mjs && node tests/verify-license.test.mjs && node tests/license.test.mjs && node tests/manifest-contract.test.mjs
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json

author: iavil
